about_item: Portable Pup Hydration: Keep your pup happy and hydrated with the MalsiPree Portable Dog Water Bottle. It's your go-to travel dog water bottle for road trips, hikes, and daily walks with its built-in portable dog water bowl

Easy One-Hand Operation: Quench your pet's thirst with just a hand using this travel dog water bowl. Keep it simple and efficient with this portable dog water bottle, the ultimate addition to your dog travel water bottle collection

Lightweight and Handy: At under 6 ounces, this travel water bottle for dogs fits right into your pet travel gear. Whether you're visiting the park or exploring the city, this portable water bowl for dogs is your trusty companion

No Spills, No Stress: Forget messy spills with the leak-proof design of this dog travel water bottle. Keep your pup's water clean and secure, whether you're at the beach or on a mountain trail with this travel water bottle for dogs

Tough and Safe Design: Made from top-quality materials, this dog water travel dispenser is built to last through any adventure. It's a trusty dog water container, safe for your pup's needs, from camping to dog house visits

ADVENTURE-READY PUPPY GIFT: Celebrate National Puppy Day with the must-have accessory for every new pet parent's first outing. Designed for those who wake up just to eat and explore, this leak-proof bottle is the perfect addition to your puppy training supplies and a top choice for puppy adoption gifts. Whether you are hitting the park or capturing social media photo props, it ensures your "goodest boy" stays hydrated for all the playdates and birthday snacks to come.

summary.text: Customers find the water bottle great for travel, walks, and car rides, praising its quality and functionality, particularly for small dogs. They appreciate its ease of use, leak-proof design, and convenience, noting it's easier than bringing a bowl of water around. The size receives mixed feedback - while some find it perfect for Golden Retrievers' snouts, others say it's too wide to fit in backpack pockets. Durability is also mixed, with some reporting it lasts for a few trips while others mention poor durability.

insights.title: Portability
insights.summary: Customers find the water bottle highly portable, being perfect for daily walks, hikes, and car rides.

examples.snippet: ...Its compact, portable design is easy to carry, and the image of my dog drinking from it on our wooden floor shows how convenient the built-in bowl is...
...He has has it since he was a puppy. It is great for travel, for taking to puppy parks, for walks on hot days to keep him hydrated....
It is leak proof, great for traveling, but the locking and unlocking button for me was so hard to use, I leave it with unlocked as long as I have to.
I like that it's small (bought the 12 oz), portable, and if my dogs decide they don't want to drink water, it can fill right back into the container...

insights.title: Quality
insights.summary: Customers praise the water bottle's quality, describing it as a great gadget.

examples.snippet: Great product, helps me save water instead of dumping it out if my dog doesn't finish it. Only thing I wish it was a bit bigger to hold more water

great idea....looks cool but there is small button plug that is spring loaded that needs to be pushed in order to release the aqua ...thats broke so...
Cute & perfect. My dog loves it when I put ice cubes in her water bottle Edit: after a year, the water bottle leaks a lot....

insights.title: Functionality
insights.summary: Customers find that the water dispenser works well, particularly for small dogs and during walks.

examples.snippet: This works great and it doesn't leak. What my Jack doesn't drink can be drained back into the bottle. You don't have to find some where to pour it....
While I like the item overall, it works well and is convenient, the main reason for my purchase was because of the strap, which makes it much easier...
This product is excellent and very handy! only complaint is the button gets jammed so it gets hard to unlock it. Other than that my dog and I love it
it works perfectly and there are no problems with it at all, my dog doesn’t really like using it though so just be aware your dog might not like it...

This water bottle for your pet is great! It does not leak and so easy to use. My dog loves having clean, fresh water when we are out and about!

took this with me on a long walk with my dog and it was very convenient, would definitely look into purchasing if you take your dog out for long...

insights.title: Durability
insights.summary: Customers report mixed experiences with the water dispenser's durability, with some saying it lasts for a few trips while others mention it breaks after one use, particularly noting issues with the wrist strap and water valve/button.

We loved this product but it broke after a few uses. The button got stuck. We tried to fix it but no luck.

authors_reviews.title: Excellent Quality and Worth Every Penny!
authors_reviews.text: I recently purchased the MalsiPree Leak-Proof Stainless Steel Portable Dog Water Bottle (24 oz), and I’m honestly impressed. The quality is excellent—sturdy, well-designed, and truly leak-proof. It’s easy to use, convenient to carry, and works exactly as described. The stainless steel build feels durable and keeps the water cool longer than expected. Overall, it delivers great value for the price, and I’d recommend it to anyone looking for a reliable, well-made water bottle for their dog. This product deserves 5 Star plus.
authors_reviews.author: Angel Reyes

authors_reviews.title: Great product!!
authors_reviews.text: Love this! I can now give our pup as much or as little as she needs. This means that I can carry a smaller bottle on long walks.
authors_reviews.author: ElleBerg

authors_reviews.title: Practical, reliable, and puppy approved!!!
authors_reviews.text: This has been a total game changer for me and my puppy! He absolutely loves it, and it makes our daily routine so much easier. It’s incredibly convenient and simple to use, especially when we’re on the go. I love that the string easily attaches right to the leash during walks no more juggling extra items or forgetting it at home. One of my biggest concerns was leaking, but this has been completely mess free, even when it’s rolling around on the car floor. Everything stays secure and contained. Highly recommend for any pet owner looking for something practical, reliable, and puppy approved!!! 🐾
authors_reviews.author: J

authors_reviews.title: Great for walks and travel
authors_reviews.text: Have the small and large size. We use the small one on our walks and the larger on longer outings. Has a “lock” on the open button so does not leak, no wasted water because you can drain the water in the bowl back into the reservoir. Great gift idea for new pet owners. Sweats if you use ice but hasn’t been a problem. Easier for our smaller dog to use but our 125 pound dog uses it also.
authors_reviews.author: Very Particular Buyer

authors_reviews.title: Great Travel Bottle — Switch Needed Breaking In
authors_reviews.text: We saw this bottle being used on a YouTube channel we enjoy, and decided to try it for our dogs. It works great, and the only reason I knocked off one star is that the on/off switch was extremely stiff at first. After pushing it back and forth a few dozen times, it loosened up and now works well enough.Our dogs love getting a drink from this, and the bowl is big enough to drop in a few ice cubes if you want. It doesn’t leak, and it’s been a very handy addition for travel.
authors_reviews.author: Alan

authors_reviews.title: First one bad, replacement is fantastic!
authors_reviews.text: Works great and incredible handy/versatile, love it. Having said that, my first one had a switch and button that were very difficult to move, took 2 thumbs to press. But I just reported it as defective (as it was) and the replacement arrived the next day and the switch/button working perfectly.
authors_reviews.author: Steven Buschman

authors_reviews.title: Great for walks especially in summer!
authors_reviews.text: I was looking for a way to give my dog water when we went on walks here in South Central florida. Our summers are very hot and we can't go too far without her needing a drink. This water bottle is a lifesaver! She now is used to it and looks to me for a drink when we go along. I'm going to make her carry it somehow LOL. I highly recommend it it is not stainless steel I'm not sure why it says that. It is a firm type plastic, it has a button that you can refill the bottle if your dog doesn't drink all the water that is dispensed. I think it's a nice feature you can also lock it so you don't actually spill it all over yourself. Highly recommended.
authors_reviews.author: Debi r.

authors_reviews.title: Practical
authors_reviews.text: This bottle is very practical for trips with my dog. It's super easy to use
authors_reviews.author: Normelina Nicle Ulloa

other_countries_reviews.title: Perfecta para viajes y para el día a día
other_countries_reviews.text: Gran capacidad y diseño apropiado para perros de todos los tamaños. Mi perra suele beber poca agua en su recipiente, sin embargo le gusta mucho beber de su botella. Es un gran aliado para paseos largos o viajes. No gotea ni pierde agua por ningún sitio. Además, el agua que no se llegue a beber puede volver a introducirse en la botella manteniendo pulsado el botón.
other_countries_reviews.author: Ro F.

other_countries_reviews.title: easy to use and good price
other_countries_reviews.text: easy to use and good price
other_countries_reviews.author: Nma Piscina

other_countries_reviews.title: Súper buen producto!
other_countries_reviews.text: Súper útil y mi perra le encanta beber de ello.
other_countries_reviews.author: Laura

other_countries_reviews.title: Hundtrinkflasche
other_countries_reviews.text: Sehr praktisch, musste immer einen Napf mitnehmen und eine Flasche Wasser, so hat man alles in einem
other_countries_reviews.author: Gabriele

other_countries_reviews.title: Great Pet Bottle!
other_countries_reviews.text: Great bottle, doesn't leak, easy to fill and use. Dog took to it immediately. Had this a few years now and it's still going strong! Easy to clean. Works perfectly!
other_countries_reviews.author: JMatthews
